evals.prompt: 帮我把这个仓库变成一个小龙虾 AI 工作空间
evals.expected_output: Creates AGENTS.md, MEMORY.md, memory/ directory, and .github/copilot-instructions.md with appropriate content. May also create workflow files.
expectations: AGENTS.md is created with agent identity and working rules
MEMORY.md is created with structured sections for preferences, decisions, context
memory/ directory is created with log/ subdirectory

evals.prompt: Set up automated issue handling so Copilot auto-responds to issues labeled 'copilot'
evals.expected_output: Creates a GitHub Actions workflow that triggers on issue events and posts an auto-reply comment when the 'copilot' label is present.
expectations: A workflow YAML file is created in .github/workflows/
The workflow triggers on issues with types [opened, labeled]
The workflow checks for 'copilot' label before acting
The workflow posts a comment using actions/github-script

evals.prompt: I want full automation - PR reviews, scheduled tasks, and issue auto-assignment. Install everything.
evals.expected_output: Runs the full preset installation creating all workflow files, memory system, and agent identity.
expectations: copilot-autofix.yml workflow is created for issue auto-assignment
copilot-review.yml workflow is created for PR reviews
copilot-scheduled.yml workflow is created for cron tasks
All core files (AGENTS.md, MEMORY.md, memory/) are set up
The install uses the 'full' preset configuration
